durable_improvement.verification: 4 deterministic Node tests passed; no failures
durable_improvement.effect: Observation collection and hostname classification now have one fail-closed, exact-commit-bound packet boundary. Partial DNS, HTTP, or served-identity evidence cannot become accepted deployment proof.

blocker_unchanged: Cloudflare environment credentials and a provider-returned deployment URL are still required for live acceptance evidence.
next_action: Integrate the packet builder into .github/workflows/cloudflare-pages-research.yml after the deploy step and upload its JSON output; only accepted=true may advance C-001.
